title: PostgreSQL Search, Language Policy, Ranking, Plans, and Safe Snippets · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss TypeScript decisions for postgresql search, language policy, ranking, plans, and safe snippets and accepts only runtime and compiler evidence, explicit non-claims, and named browser, Node, network, XML, PostgreSQL, handle, load, accessibility, deployment, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded runtime-validated reader search. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-ca…
objectives: Build weighted tsvector documents from admitted safe text with language, provenance, refresh, and deletion policy.
Validate length, token count, mode, language, filters, and empty results before using parameterized plainto, websearch, or explicit tsquery.
Verify representative GIN-backed plans, selectivity, scale, write amplification, latency, row limits, and plan-change thresholds.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
